urdu transliteration text:
Along with Bibi Zainab, Bibi Fizza is enduring all hardships/suffering
ZAINAB KE SAATH FIZZA HAR GHAM UTHA RAHI HAI
ZAINAB KE SAATH FIZZA
EK DUSRE SE DONO AANSO CHUPA RAHIN HAI
english translation text: Both of them are hiding their tears from each other

urdu transliteration text: BAZAR E SHAM ME HE MAJMA SHARABIO KA
english translation text: The market of Damascus is full of drunkards

urdu transliteration text:
Janabe Fizza is walking in front of Bibi Zainab…
ZAINAB K AGEY AGEY CHAL KAR JANAB E FIZA
ZEHRA KI BETIO KA PARDA BANA RAHI HEN
english translation text: Acting like a veil for the daughters of Bibi Zahra

urdu transliteration text: HAR EK QADAM PE DURRE JORO JAFA MUSALSAL
english translation text: Every step of the way, the prisoners are welcomed by continuous whipping

urdu transliteration text: KUFE KI SHAAM KI HAIN GALIYAN MISAAL E MAQTAL
english translation text: Kufa and Shaam are no less than a battlefield

urdu transliteration text: SHAHZADIYON KI SAANSE RUK RUK KE AARAHI HAI
english translation text: The princesses (of Ahlul Bayt) are unable to even breathe properly

urdu transliteration text: BAZAAR KI JAFA ME DARBAR KE SITAM ME
english translation text: From humiliation in the markets to torture in the palace…

urdu transliteration text: FIZZA SHAREEK E GHAM HAI BINTE ALI KE GHAM ME
english translation text: Bibi Fizza is alongside the daughter of Ali (A.S), sharing her sorrows

urdu transliteration text: PAYGHAM E KARBALA KO HAR DAM BACHA RAHI HAI
english translation text: She is saving the message of Kerbala at each and every opportunity

urdu transliteration text: SARWAR KA SAATH JAISE ABBAS NE NIBHAYA
english translation text: The way Abbas (A.S) supported Imam Hussain (A.S)…

urdu transliteration text:
Bibi Fizza stood by Bibi Zainab at every step
ZAINAB KA SAATH DEKE FIZZA HAR EK LAMHA
HAQ E WAFA NIBHANA SAB KO SIKHA RAHIN HAI
english translation text: In this way, she taught us the embodiment of loyalty and allegiance

urdu transliteration text: KARBOBALA KA MAIDAN WOH SHAM HO YA KUFA
english translation text: Whether it was the plains of Kerbala, Shaam or Kufa…

urdu transliteration text:
(Bibi Fizza) never left Bibi Zainab (A.S) nor Imam Hussain (A.S) alone
ZAINAB KO SHAHE DEEN KO CHORA KAHIN NA TANHA
DEEN E KHUDA KI KHATIR BAZU BANDHA RAHIN HAI
english translation text: For the sake of God’s religion, she was even ready to have her hands tied

urdu transliteration text:
Amongst the caravan, there is Shabbir’s orphan daughter
HUM RAAHH HAI SAFAR ME SHABIR KI YATIMA
FIZZA KO GHAM YEHI HAI BEHAAL HAI SAKINA
english translation text: The only grief Bibi Fizza has is that Bibi Sakina is not at ease

urdu transliteration text: BACHI KI SISKIAN BHI DIL KO DUKHA RAHEIN HAI
english translation text: The cries of the little girl are aching her heart continuously

urdu transliteration text: SALMAN AZMI YEH HAR CHASHME AAM ME HAI
english translation text: ‘Salman Azmi’ (poet’s name) - now it is clearly visible to the public

urdu transliteration text: ZAINAB KE SAATH INKI TURBAT BHI SHAAM ME HAI
english translation text: Her resting place is along with Bibi Zainab in Shaam

urdu transliteration text:
Till this day, Bibi Fizza is loyal and faithful to Bibi Zainab
ZAINAB KA SAATH AB TAK FIZZA NIBHA RAHEIN HAI
